---
species: "Unknown Green Blade"
accepted_code: "UGBL"
alternate_codes: 
diminutive: 
alternate_diminutives:
common_name: ""
field_id_possible:
  - no
description: "bright green color" # make sure to fill this in!
image: '/header_images/chlotophyta.jpeg'
image_credit: 'Photo from (https://www.seaweed.ie/algae/chlorophyta.html)' # MUST have an image credit
categories:
  - green algae
  - plants
sampling_programs:
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 801
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page --> [WORMS PAGE](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=801)
